title: MobiVault – Full-Stack E-Commerce Application
description: Developed a scalable e-commerce platform using the MERN stack with secure user authentication (OTP & JWT), product and category management, shopping cart, order management, and admin dashboard. Implemented real-world features like coupon system, email verification, and session-based authentication.

title: MobiVault – Admin Dashboard System
description: Developed a secure admin dashboard for an e-commerce platform with features like product management, category control, user management, order tracking, and coupon system. Implemented authentication, session handling, and real-time data updates for efficient admin operations.

title: Personal Developer Portfolio v2
description: Designed and developed an advanced version of my personal portfolio with enhanced UI/UX, smooth animations, and fully responsive design. Showcases my MERN stack projects, technical skills, and real-world development experience.

title: Developer Portfolio
description: Designed and developed a modern, responsive portfolio website to showcase my MERN stack projects, technical skills, and development journey. Built with React and Tailwind CSS, featuring smooth animations and optimized performance.

title: Santa Good Deeds – Community Web App
description: Developed a full-stack web application during a Brocamp Hackathon to promote positive actions and community engagement. Users can post and track good deeds, interact with others, and build a positive digital environment. Focused on clean UI, user interaction, and efficient backend data handling.
